summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Hydrated security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; hydrated non-security PRs are kept as independent backlog items because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/close/fix actions are blocked or not justified by the artifact. Five job-listed PRs were not present in the compacted preflight item matrix, so they are marked needs_human for missing live hydrated state rather than planned for mutation.
